name: mhrsntrk.com
description: Personal website of Mahir Senturk. Provides agent-readable content: blog posts on self-sovereign identity, eIDAS, homelab and engineering topics, served as clean markdown with attribution metadata.

skills.name: Blog post index as markdown
skills.description: GET https://mhrsntrk.com/api/markdown returns a markdown index of all blog posts with canonical URLs and publish dates.

skills.name: Single blog post as markdown
skills.description: GET https://mhrsntrk.com/api/markdown/blog/{slug} returns one blog post as clean markdown with author attribution and canonical URL.

skills.name: LLM-friendly site overview
skills.description: GET https://mhrsntrk.com/llms.txt for a short site overview, or https://mhrsntrk.com/llms-full.txt for the expanded version.
